raw_consumer_statement: American Express is illegibly billing me for several transactions for which I have not engaged or authorized. I have provided them with both online and direct written notice sent via mail timely regarding this. However, American Express believes they are above the law and seem to believe they know better. They have now twice ignored my notices and informed me that they believe the transactions are valid when in fact they are not valid and i have never engaged in these charges. American Express should be investigated for their unlawful practices and for making me waste my time for no dam reason. Under regulation XXXX & Z they have no right to harm me and thereby also harming their own company including its investors which includes myself. They apparently have some ill trained personal with very bad and poor practices. please see my detailed letters attached.
